### ⚡Update: WW International, Inc. ($WW)⚡

Do y’all remember back in November 2023 when **Goldman Sachs Group Inc. ($GS)** released its “conviction list” and ranked **WW International Inc. ($WW)** at the top? We’re not kidding folks, that actually happened, and GS predicted the stock would gain 117% over the following 12 months. It was trading at $8.23/share [when the news broke](https://substack.com/redirect/dc573b74-346d-4002-a23a-3dcd2d0e6a4d?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8). So how’s it doing now, with only a few months left to go? LOL ⬇️:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_1324,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Faa3cec64-02eb-471b-9131-69337a68be64_662x501.png)](https://substack.com/redirect/589be14b-8b95-4c7a-b1ad-af2ba88cda81?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: Google

Down ~90%! Practically a penny stock!! Great call vampire squid!!

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/w_498,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_lossy/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ffd09791d-484a-4f77-a5ec-f3a3ad521f7f_498x280.gif)](https://substack.com/redirect/59ffdc95-2e22-44d4-b6a3-4e146ba9519b?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)

Source: GIPHY

**WW International Inc. ($WW)** reported [earnings](https://substack.com/redirect/820e50e9-4f26-4832-b240-fb47ff33aa73?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8) on August 1, 2024 and … well … suffice it to say, there wasn’t a whole lot in there that’ll make our friend Nelson here ⬆️ quit laughing and pointing (the stock got hammered 37% on the report). **CEO Sima Sistani**, bless her heart, had to get on an earnings call, endure the “Hee Haw”s and explain herself ([she didn’t think running Weight Watchers would be this hard](https://substack.com/redirect/7f0be575-b582-4783-8c7d-7726c0b4cd19?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8)!) and articulate the company’s big vision. She said:

> *In order to win in this dynamic GLP-1 environment, we are completely reimagining how we operate to catalyze our path as the leading digital weight health provider.*

“Reimagine,” huh? That’s one of those coded dog-whistle words that means *“the quarter was f\*cking horrible.”* How bad, Sima? From the [press release](https://substack.com/redirect/820e50e9-4f26-4832-b240-fb47ff33aa73?j=eyJ1IjoiOW95azAifQ.3I-y5PDezjo-i0ls31AGTIH4E8sNNl31puiktHvNIm8): paid subscribers *plunged* 6.1% YOY; revenues *collapsed* to $202mm, a *shocking* 10.6% below last year (constant currency basis); and “adjusted EBITDA” was $50.2mm, *heartbreakingly* flat against $49.4mm in the year-ago period. Oh, but you prefer EPS, that being a “GAAP” measure? Fully diluted: $0.29 vs. $0.65. Depressing. ...
